PublicChannel.description: The medium through which a service user interacts with the council (e.g., Phone, Online, In-Person).

CouncilAgent.description: The interface or actor that receives the interaction on behalf of the council (e.g., Website, Human, API Gateway).

Capability.description: The modular business or technical building block used by an agent to fulfill a need (e.g., Payments, Identity, Workflow).

ITSystem.description: The actual physical software application, SaaS, or platform (e.g., Generic CRM, GovPay).

Function.description: A specific statutory or corporate task being executed (e.g., Waste collection, Adult safeguarding).

FunctionGroup.description: The overarching service domain or directorate (e.g., Adult Social Care, Environmental Services).

nodes.label: In person
nodes.description: Face-to-face interaction at council offices or public centers.

nodes.label: Phone
nodes.description: Voice calls made by citizens to the council contact center.

nodes.label: Email
nodes.description: Asynchronous written communication via email.

nodes.label: Letter
nodes.description: Traditional physical mail and postal correspondence.

nodes.label: Online
nodes.description: Web-based interactions via the council website or portals.

nodes.label: SMS/ Messaging
nodes.description: Text messaging and messaging applications (e.g., WhatsApp).

nodes.label: Social Media
nodes.description: Interactions via platforms like Twitter, Facebook, or Nextdoor.

nodes.label: Smart Device
nodes.description: Interactions via smart speakers (Alexa, Google Home) or IoT devices.

nodes.label: Third Party
nodes.description: Interactions brokered by external agencies or partners.

nodes.label: Video
nodes.description: Remote face-to-face appointments via video conferencing.

nodes.label: App
nodes.description: Native or cross-platform mobile application for citizens.

nodes.label: API Gateway
nodes.description: Machine-to-machine interface for third-party integrations and smart devices.

nodes.label: Automated Phone
nodes.description: Automated telephony system, such as IVR or voicebots.

nodes.label: Human
nodes.description: Customer Service Representatives or specialist officers handling queries.

nodes.label: Public Device
nodes.description: Kiosks or shared hardware available in council spaces.

nodes.label: Website
nodes.description: The main council web portal and content management system.

nodes.label: Agentic AI
nodes.description: Autonomous or semi-autonomous AI processing for complex queries and routing.

nodes.label: Booking
nodes.description: Scheduling and reservation engine for appointments and resources.

nodes.label: Email
nodes.description: Standard electronic mail handling, sending, and routing.

nodes.label: Forms
nodes.description: Digital forms processing, validation, and structured data capture.

nodes.label: Identity
nodes.description: Authentication, authorization, and citizen single sign-on (SSO).

nodes.label: Payments
nodes.description: Secure processing platform for inbound payments and disbursements.

nodes.label: SMS
nodes.description: Short Message Service gateway for outbound alerts and inbound queries.

nodes.label: Telephony / Fax
nodes.description: Voice communication routing, IVR, and call center infrastructure.

nodes.label: Workflow
nodes.description: Business process execution and case routing logic.

nodes.label: Generic Social Care System
nodes.description: Core case management system for Adult and Children's social care.

nodes.label: Generic Waste System
nodes.description: Operational system for managing domestic and commercial waste collection.

nodes.label: Generic Electoral System
nodes.description: Specialist system for electoral registration and ballot management.

nodes.label: Generic Corporate CRM
nodes.description: Centralised system for managing customer interactions and service requests.

nodes.label: Revs and Bens System
nodes.description: System for processing council tax, business rates, and housing benefits.

nodes.label: Income Management System
nodes.description: Corporate income, receipting, and cash management platform.

nodes.label: HR & Payroll System
nodes.description: Human resources, staff management, and payroll processing.

nodes.label: Generic Business Support System
nodes.description: Line of business system for local enterprise support and grants.

nodes.label: Generic Public Safety System
nodes.description: System supporting emergency planning, policing liaison, and fire safety.

nodes.label: Generic Education Management System
nodes.description: Management information system for schools, pupils, and early years.

nodes.label: Generic Environmental Health System
nodes.description: Regulatory system for environmental protection and trading standards.

nodes.label: Generic Housing Management System
nodes.description: Housing management system covering tenancies, allocations, and repairs.

nodes.label: Generic Leisure Management System
nodes.description: Booking and facility management platform for leisure and culture venues.

nodes.label: Generic Licensing & Regulatory System
nodes.description: Statutory system for processing licenses, permits, and permissions.

nodes.label: Generic Planning & Building Control System
nodes.description: System managing planning applications and building control.

nodes.label: Generic Highways Management System
nodes.description: Asset management system for roads, transport schemes, and parking.

nodes.label: Generic Corporate ERP
nodes.description: Enterprise Resource Planning for core back-office finance and procurement.

nodes.label: Generic Library Management System
nodes.description: Library management system for cataloging, loans, and membership.
